basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Jr. Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 18 July 2026 on the official website https://home.iitd.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limits. 5% relaxation of marks may be granted to the SC/ST Candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: 1st Class B.Tech in Chemical Engineering with NET/GATE
qualification.details: 1st Class B.Tech in Chemical Engineering with first class with distinction with NET/GATE. The requirement of NET/GATE examination for the selection to the post of JRF/SRF may be relaxed for the candidates who have graduated from Centrally Funded Technical Institutes (CFTIs) with a CGPA of more than 8.000 (80% aggregate marks).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: 1st Class B.Tech in Chemical Engineering with first class with distinction with NET/GATE. The requirement of NET/GATE examination for the selection to the post of JRF/SRF may be relaxed for the candidates who have graduated from Centrally Funded Technical Institutes (CFTIs) with a CGPA of more than 8.000 (80% aggregate marks).

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limits. 5% relaxation of marks may be granted to the SC/ST Candidates.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting applications for the IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow recruitment is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Jr. Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a 1st Class B.Tech in Chemical Engineering with NET/GATE. Candidates graduating from CFTIs with a CGPA of more than 8.000 may be exempted from NET/GATE.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Jr. Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month plus HRA at 27%.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email. You need to prepare your application with all necessary documents and send it to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Jr. Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Jr. Research Fellow position is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, a 5% relaxation of marks may be granted to SC/ST candidates. Specific age limits should be confirmed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of IIT Delhi for more information?
faq.answer: The official website of IIT Delhi for more information is http://ird.iitd.ac.in.
